chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Misc. Application No.S-278 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 04-11-2025. None present for the applicant. Mr. Ali Hassan Chandio advocate for the respondent No.2. Mr. Neel Parkash, D.P.G. = This application for cancellation of bail was filed on 14-07- 2021. Mr. Ali Hassan Chandio advocate for the respondent No.2 has submitted copy of judgment dated 06-05-2023 in Criminal Case No. 101/ 2021 passed by learned Civil Judge and J.M, Samaro, whereby respondent/accused Kashif was acquitted whereas respondent/ accused Muzaffar Ali was expired during pendency of the case and proceedings of the case against him was abated vide order dated 21-12-2022 by learned trial court. In view of above, instant Criminal Miscellaneous application has become infructuous; hence same is hereby dismissed. JUDGE *Saleem*
